name: the shared write-time primitive returns the same native verdict on repeated independent runs of the same file
command:
printf 'const x: any = 1;' > a.ts
A=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" a.ts 2>&1 | grep -oE 'status=[a-z]+ rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=[0-9]+')
B=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" a.ts 2>&1 | grep -oE 'status=[a-z]+ rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=[0-9]+')
[ -n "$A" ] && [ "$A" = "$B" ] && echo deterministic-verdict 1>&2
